title: erigeron elborsensis
intro: Erigeron elborsensis, also known as Elbo's Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Erigeron elborsensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and provide relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Erigeron elborsensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal purposes.
